gist.headline: Sorting out the signals
gist.blurb: The model monitor now correctly sorts genuine backend hiccups above client-side typos. Less noise, more signal, happier debugging.
gist.summary: Updated the model monitor's sorting logic to rank genuine model success rates above 4xx client errors.
gist.impact: Developers looking at the monitor will now see actual backend failures prioritized over user-side request errors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot organizing data. The robot represents the 'model monitor' and Polly is sorting the 'success' metrics (represented as blocks or charts) logically.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute bee mascot with a tiny tool belt organizing glowing data blocks, while a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head happily displays a clean, sorted bar chart on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute bee mascot with a tiny tool belt organizing glowing data blocks, while a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head happily displays a clean, sorted bar chart on its screen.
